title: Centralize path resolution and enforce CWD validation
summary: Implemented repo_root validation to reject '/' and added tests to cover the guard and .agent path resolution.
acceptance_criteria: There is exactly one path resolution implementation used by all tools.
On MCP server startup, if CWD is "/", the server errors out with a clear message.
Tool path resolution expands paths relative to CWD (e.g., CWD/.agent).

steps.description: Identify all code paths that expand or resolve tool file system paths.
Implement or refactor to a single shared path resolver and update all callers.
Add startup validation to reject CWD == "/" with a clear error.
Add or update tests to cover resolver behavior and CWD validation.

notes: Keep changes minimal and focused on path resolution logic.
